title: srnyx's Modpack
description: This is just the modpack I use on a daily basis, nothing too special
body:
A simple **FABRIC** modpack that includes all the mods I play with, usually on multiplayer.

The modpack includes mainly optimization mods, but it doesn't have OptiFine. Instead of OptiFine, it uses Sodium and other mods like Capes that give it the OptiFine feel.

If you are looking for a more optimized gameplay experience, check out my other modpack, [srnyxly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/srnyxly)!

# Wiki
Yes, this mod has a wiki. It describes each mod that is in the modpack and may include even more information in the future.

https://docs.srnyx.com/modpack

## Mods
For a full list, please see https://docs.srnyx.com/modpack/mods

### External mods
These are mods I'm required to list due to their licenses

- [Better Fps - Render Distance[Fabric]](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-fps-render-distance-fabric) by [someaddon](https://curseforge.com/members/someaddon)
- [Better PVP](https://chocolateminecraft.com/betterpvp2.php) by [xaero96](https://curseforge.com/members/xaero96)
- [Effective 💦](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective) by [doctor4t](https://www.curseforge.com/members/doctor4t) (only in older versions)

## Disclaimer
Some of these mods may be considered cheating on some servers. Please make sure you follow server rules and disable any mods that may break them!

I'm not responsible if you get banned on any servers.
